title: ScreenState
description: Structured snapshot of the Android screen emitted by AccessibilityService after every action. Must never contain raw screenshots. If is_sensitive = true, the executor must abort or pause immediately — no further actions are permitted.

foreground_package.description: Package name of the foreground app, e.g. 'com.whatsapp'.

window_title.description: Title of the active window or Activity label.

screen_hash.description: Deterministic hash of the accessibility node tree. Used for change detection and audit fingerprinting. Must be stable for identical visible trees.

focused_element_ref.description: Ref of the currently focused accessibility node, if any.

is_sensitive.description: True when the screen contains sensitive content (password entry, OTP, payment, biometric). Forces immediate abort or manual takeover.

nodes.description: Flat list of all accessibility nodes in the visible tree. Hierarchy is reconstructed via ref/children.

captured_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when this snapshot was taken.

ref.description: Opaque node identifier, stable for the lifetime of this screen render.
